name: Spiced White Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 1 Head white cabbage, cut into 1/2 inch ribbons
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil cabbage ribbons for 20 minutes in lightly salted water. Drain and cool.
2. Heat olive oil in a 14-inch saute pan until smoking.
3. Add cumin, horseradish, pepper, and speck to the hot oil and toss to coat.
4. Add the cooled cabbage to the pan and toss again.
5. Cook for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the cabbage is soft and well-seasoned.
6. Sprinkle with lemon juice and serve with sliced goose breast.
Yield: 4 servings
